case_title: ADAMS, W.T. REV. et al VS KNOX, ANDRE C.

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADAMS, W.T. REV. JENKINS, CHRISTENA HEARING SET FOR AUG-11-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX, ANDRE C. CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-15-2000 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
CERT. MAIL TO ANDRE KNOX RETURNED SIGNED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADAMS, W.T. REV. JENKINS, CHRISTENA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KNOX, ANDRE C. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-11-2000, GRANTED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-07-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-15-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ADAMS, W.T. REV. JENKINS, CHRISTENA AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX, ANDRE C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO REV. W.T. ADAMS RETURNED "UNDELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED"
